description: First-pass contract structure for discovery, writable config, commissioning data, and runtime exclusions.

groups.purpose: Expose immutable identity descriptors for discovery and auditing.
groups.client_notes: Treat as discovery metadata; do not submit writes.

groups.purpose: Describe implementation class, role, and deployment context.
groups.client_notes: Useful for filtering capabilities and supported workflows.

groups.purpose: Report board/sensor/actuator inventory relevant to profile behavior.
groups.client_notes: Inventory may explain optional capability availability.

groups.purpose: Describe connected component graph exposed by implementation.
groups.client_notes: May be omitted on minimal implementations.
Writes are validated and may be staged depending on commissioning state.

groups.purpose: Writable setup values required for activation readiness.
groups.client_notes: Fields may be editable only in specific commissioning stages.

groups.purpose: Expose software platform and contract support descriptors.
groups.client_notes: Consumers should use this for compatibility checks.

runtime_excluded.purpose: Clarify runtime values that are observable but not writable configuration.
runtime_excluded.client_notes: Runtime values should be read from state and telemetry surfaces, not config update commands.
